   "reasoning": "We need to stabilize the workforce, and a funding boost can help buy us some time. I'm willing to try a teacher incentive to retain our good people. I'm not willing to spend on student scholarships right now, and attendance mandates can be tricky. Transparency is key, so let's make that happen ASAP. I'm not keen on hiring new staff, at least not without seeing some results from our existing team. And while counseling programs are a good idea, I don't want to overcommit with more expenses.",
   "confidence": 0.7
